ORDER ON SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "GRANTED". "JUDGMENT DATED 9/18/07 IS VACATED, AS ENTERED IN ERROR. PRIOR BANKRUPTCY STAY IN EFFECT AT TIME OF TRIAL" , AS PER COMMISIONER. COPY OF ORDER MAILED TO PARTIES.
